en.cmd.show_info_desc: Show dev container configuration in an info panel
en.cmd.run_lifecycle_desc: Pick and run a devcontainer lifecycle command
en.cmd.rebuild_desc: Rebuild the dev container using the devcontainer CLI
en.cmd.open_terminal_desc: Open a terminal inside the running dev container
en.status.cli_not_found: devcontainer CLI not found. Install with: npm i -g @devcontainers/cli
en.status.container_not_running: No running dev container found. Run 'Dev Container: Rebuild' first.
en.popup.cli_message: The devcontainer CLI is needed for rebuild. Copy the install command below, or dismiss.
en.popup.activate_message: Found dev container "%{name}" (%{image}). Rebuild the container, or view its configuration.
en.popup.activate_message_no_cli: Found dev container "%{name}" (%{image}). Install the devcontainer CLI to rebuild, or view the configuration.
en.panel.footer: Tab: cycle buttons  Enter: activate  Alt+r: run  Alt+o: open  Alt+b: rebuild  q: close
